path: PNGS/Person killed while defending his wealth is Shaheed 1.png
text: It was narrated from Zaid bin Al bin alHusain from his father that his ‘grandiather said Messenger of Allah (2) said: “Wwhoever is kiled defending his wealth is & martyr” Grade: Sahih hadeeth; this isnad is Hasan] (Darussalam)
